creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Submitter reports: 

math/atlas built successfully on my Pentium-M computer with the latest 
lang/gcc4.2.5_20081126 under FreeBSD-6.4-p1.  I successfully rebuilt 
math/R-2.8.0 linked to math/atlas and all packages (including Matrix and 
lme4) which all work fine. 

It will take a few more days for me to build and test on the dual 233MMX 
antique (classic).
